untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 2+ std dev from MA (Bollinger Band equivalent not directly available), and divergence signal detection which is a multi-bar pattern comparison requiring custom logic beyond single-bar indicator values. Volume spike threshold and climactic extreme pattern identification require composite logic.
translation_notes: Approximated climactic detection using rsi_14 extremes (>75 for overbought, <25 for oversold) and volume confirmation via vol_ratio_20. Entry uses reversal signal (close crossing prev_high/low). Exit uses 3-bar max hold via hold_days_max parameter. Translated for BOTH long and short entries since direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT. True climactic setup (2 StdDev) and divergence confirmation remain untranslatable with allowed operators.
